/**
 * extract cube related info for debugging/distributing purpose
 * TODO: deal with II case
 */
"Specify realizations in which project to extract"
"set this to true if want extract the segments info. Default true"
"set this to true if want to extract job info/outputs too. Default false"
"set this to true if want to extract segment details too, such as dict, tablesnapshot. Default false"
"specify the dest dir to save the related metadata"
//these cubes needs to be saved skipping segments
"destDir is not set, exit directly without extracting"
"The resource paths going to be extracted:"
"Exception when copying optional resource {}. May be caused by resource missing. Ignore it."
"It's useless to set includeJobs to true when includeSegments is set to false"
"Does not support extract II instance or hybrid that contains II"
